requirement: Buyer can create sourcing events for RFIs, RFQs, and RFPs in Coupa.
Supplier can participate in sourcing events via email and the Coupa Supplier Portal (CSP).
Coupa supports automated scoring and evaluation of supplier responses for sourcing events.
Buyer can configure event timelines, evaluations, scoring, and award decisions in Coupa.
Approval workflows aligned with Limits of Authority (DOA / LOA) are supported in Coupa for sourcing events.
Follow-on events, event extensions, and resend-to-production scenarios are supported in Coupa for sourcing events.
Savings tracking (planned, negotiated, cost avoidance) is supported in Coupa for sourcing events.
Relevant sourcing-related system settings and administrative configurations are supported in Coupa.
Business scenarios for UAT validation are supported in Coupa for sourcing events.
Buyer can create sourcing events for centre-managed commodities and services.
Buyer can create sourcing events for operational sourcing needs.
Users can conduct RFx (RFI, RFP, RFQ) events in Coupa sourcing module.
Users can conduct auctions (English reverse auction, Dutch reverse auction, Japanese reverse auction) in Coupa sourcing module.
Auction process allows for direct negotiations with suppliers.
Auction process allows for awarding the business to the lowest bidder.
English reverse auction allows for direct feedback on a submitted quote.
English reverse auction awards the best (lowest) quote at the end of the event.
Dutch reverse auction opens at a high starting price and decreases at scheduled intervals.
Dutch reverse auction allows the first supplier to accept the current price to win the auction.
Japanese reverse auction begins at a low price point and increases incrementally.
Japanese reverse auction allows the last remaining supplier to win the contract.
Sourcing events can be converted into contracts.
Buyers can create purchase requisitions for approved suppliers.
Procurement team can manage centre-managed commodities and services.
Procurement team can manage operational sourcing needs.
